title: Roof gardens
description:
Transforming barren urban rooftops into vibrant, living landscapes, rooftop gardens are more than just aesthetic additions—they're sustainable solutions that breathe life into concrete environments. These elevated green spaces offer a unique opportunity to reclaim urban areas, providing essential benefits that extend far beyond visual appeal.

In the context of elderly care facilities, rooftop gardens become particularly transformative. These carefully designed green spaces are not merely decorative elements, but therapeutic environments that significantly enhance the quality of life for senior residents. By creating accessible, safe, and engaging outdoor areas, we enable older adults to maintain a meaningful connection with nature, providing opportunities for gentle physical activity, social interaction, and sensory stimulation.

The illustrated example demonstrates how a thoughtfully designed rooftop garden can become a vital space for residents, with wide, stable pathways, raised planting beds for easy accessibility, comfortable seating areas, and sensory-rich plantings that can be enjoyed by individuals with limited mobility. Such spaces offer more than just a view: they provide a healing, inclusive environment that supports the physical and mental well-being of elderly residents.
